items.name_en: 【sunset Handbag】 m13617 Monogram
items.name_cn:
【sunset Handbag】 m13617 Monogram
The sunset handbag features Monogram Denim canvas. This material is crafted through multiple processes, woven with GOTS-certified cotton yarn to create the Monogram pattern before bleaching. The finished product undergoes sand washing for a unique look, and the brand buckle adds a striking touch.
Size: 27 x 18 x 3 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【sunset Handbag】 m13617 Monogram
The sunset handbag features Monogram Denim canvas. This material is crafted through multiple processes, woven with GOTS-certified cotton yarn to create the Monogram pattern before bleaching. The finished product undergoes sand washing for a unique look, and the brand buckle adds a striking touch.
Size: 27 x 18 x 3 cm

items.name_en: 【slim trunk Handbag】 m13147 25445 Yellow Flower
items.name_cn:
【slim trunk Handbag】 m13147 25445 Yellow Flower
The slim trunk handbag debuted in elegant style at the 2025 Cruise early spring show, adding a new member to the classic trunk handbag series. Monogram canvas, Monogram reverse canvas, and smooth calfskin trim are cleverly combined, showcasing Nicolas Ghesquière's signature touch, while the s-lock and metal rivets pay homage to the long-standing tradition of the trunk series.
Size: 12 x 4 x 23 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【slim trunk Handbag】 m13147 25445 Yellow Flower

Monogram canvas, Monogram reverse canvas, and smooth calfskin trim are cleverly combined, showcasing Nicolas Ghesquière's signature touch, while the s-lock and metal rivets pay homage to the long-standing tradition of the trunk series.
Size: 12 x 4 x 23 cm

items.name_en: 【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
items.name_cn:
【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
The be alma handbag blends the brand's iconic Alma handbag and makeup pouch designs, playing with urban travel style in the 2025 Cruise early spring collection. The compact structure features a woven chain strap, serving as a clutch or worn crossbody with a long shoulder strap.
Size: 15 x 7 x 27 cm

Size: 15 x 7 x 27 cm

items.name_en: 【Speedy 20 Handbag】 m13146 Vintage Hardware Edition
items.name_cn:
【Speedy 20 Handbag】 m13146 Vintage Hardware Edition
The LV pillow from this season's Louis Vuitton 2025 Early Spring collection. Cool black leather meets small vintage monogram, showcasing a unique fashion attitude.
Size: 20 x 14 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【Speedy 20 Handbag】 m13146 Vintage Hardware Edition
The LV pillow from this season's Louis Vuitton 2025 Early Spring collection. Cool black leather meets small vintage monogram, showcasing a unique fashion attitude.

items.name_en: 【Speedy Bandoulière 25】 m11848 Gradient Silver
items.name_cn:
【Speedy Bandoulière 25】 m11848 Gradient Silver
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 is part of the LV Snow collection, featuring the house's new gradient silver finish Monogram nylon. The compact style is elevated with silver hardware and includes a signature floral charm. It fits essentials like a phone, wallet, and keys, and offers multiple carrying options thanks to an extra detachable and adjustable strap.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【Speedy Bandoulière 25】 m11848 Gradient Silver
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 is part of the LV Snow collection, featuring the house's new gradient silver finish Monogram nylon. The compact style is elevated with silver hardware and includes a signature floral charm. It fits essentials like a phone, wallet, and keys, and offers multiple carrying options thanks to an extra detachable and adjustable strap.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm

items.name_en: 【Camera Box Handbag】 m82465
items.name_cn:
【Camera Box Handbag】 m82465
This Camera Box handbag features a modern structure crafted from Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, blending signature details of the Petite Malle such as the S-lock closure, metal corners, and studs. A slender chain adds a feminine touch, while the top handle offers another comfortable carrying option.
Size: 12.5 x 17.6 x 6 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【Camera Box Handbag】 m82465
This Camera Box handbag features a modern structure crafted from Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, blending signature details of the Petite Malle such as the S-lock closure, metal corners, and studs. A slender chain adds a feminine touch, while the top handle offers another comfortable carrying option.
Size: 12.5 x 17.6 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 【Pico Side Trunk Handbag】 m83018 46358
items.name_cn:
【Pico Side Trunk Handbag】 m83018 46358
The Pico Side Trunk handbag combines Monogram canvas with leather trim, referencing the brand's classic hard suitcases with the S-lock closure and metal corners to pay homage to Louis Vuitton's travel heritage. The handle and adjustable shoulder strap are detachable, and a secure zipper completes the functional details.
Size: 14.0 x 10.0 x 6.5 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【Pico Side Trunk Handbag】 m83018 46358
The Pico Side Trunk handbag combines Monogram canvas with leather trim, referencing the brand's classic hard suitcases with the S-lock closure and metal corners to pay homage to Louis Vuitton's travel heritage. The handle and adjustable shoulder strap are detachable, and a secure zipper completes the functional details.
Size: 14.0 x 10.0 x 6.5 cm

items.name_en: 【Side Trunk Handbag】 m46358 Vintage (Yellow Leather)
items.name_cn:
【Side Trunk Handbag】 m46358 Vintage (Yellow Leather)
Nicolas Ghesquière revisits Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage to create this small Side Trunk handbag. Monogram canvas is paired with leather trim, where the leather zipper pull creatively connects the iconic S-lock closure, drawing the eye together with reinforced metal corners. The wide handle and leather shoulder strap are both detachable.
Size: 21 x 14 x 6 cm

specs.rawTitle:
【Side Trunk Handbag】 m46358 Vintage (Yellow Leather)
Nicolas Ghesquière revisits Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage to create this small Side Trunk handbag. Monogram canvas is paired with leather trim, where the leather zipper pull creatively connects the iconic S-lock closure, drawing the eye together with reinforced metal corners. The wide handle and leather shoulder strap are both detachable.
Size: 21 x 14 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
items.name_cn:
【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
A highly stylized soft silhouette with sharp, strong edges fused with a box shape. The classic monogram pattern creates a unique look in the crowded bag market. It looks amazing worn and holds up well in any scene, offering a street-style vibe with a large capacity.
Size: 18*12.5*8cm

items.name_en: 🆕 M47199 Dynamic Code Top-tier Original OnTheGo Small Handbag from the collaboration series between the brand and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, featuring cute duck motifs on the glossy calfskin and a deep microfiber lining echoing the original background. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap complete the look.
items.name_cn:
🆕 M47199 Dynamic Code Top-tier Original OnTheGo Small Handbag from the collaboration series between the brand and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, featuring cute duck motifs on the glossy calfskin and a deep microfiber lining echoing the original background. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap complete the look.
	•	Monogram Reverse coated canvas with calfskin trim
	•	Calfskin
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Smooth calfskin trim
	•	Hook closure
	•	Spacious capacity
	•	Zippered interior pocket
	•	Glossy calfskin trim
	•	Shoulder strap: detachable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 35.2 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 53.0 cm
	•	Handle: double handle
